title: Chooses Strategic Alliance
situation: After evaluating mounting pressure, Roz commits to coordinated action with trusted allies rather than relying on Corozal alone.
knows: Corozal cannot secure long-term stability in isolation.
Disciplined alliance can be leveraged without surrendering sovereignty.
Her authority is strongest when paired with selective trust and clear terms.
does_not_know: Which allies may fracture under sustained conflict.
The final cost of alliance in political concessions and personal risk.
Whether the coalition can hold after immediate threats are neutralized.
